message:
test(labruntime): port 8 watchdog tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port 8 of 10 #[tokio::test] async tests from watchdog.rs to asupersync
RuntimeFixture. Includes local FailingMockWezterm implementation since
the original is #[cfg(test)]-gated (unavailable in integration tests).
2 tests omitted: spawn_watchdog + sleep require runtime timer support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
